tweets.text: i wonder if anyone out there has ever come up with different theories of organizing societies that we could give a try - oooh woops, nope, kings again
if only there was a system of human organization that could be used to solve this all!

no one sees any irony in literally floating across the ocean and conducting a revolutionary war to rid ourselves of kings and then being given the internet– a post-scarcity utopia of information– and immediately rebuilding little fiefdoms inside it and being upset at our kings
